name: Value Pawn & Jewelry
description_short: Value Pawn & Jewelry Brandon, Florida — Value Pawn & Jewelry is a Miami-based pawn shop offering collateral-based loans, gold/jewelry buying, and discou...
description_long:
Value Pawn & Jewelry operates as a traditional pawn shop located at 736 NW 183rd Street in Miami, Florida. The business is part of the EZPAWN family of stores and has been serving the Miami community with in-person financial services and retail merchandise sales.

The company offers multiple financial and retail services centered around collateral-based lending. Customers can obtain pawn loans by bringing items in working condition to receive immediate cash, with loan amounts based on item value. The business also operates as a gold and jewelry buyer, testing precious metals to provide fair pricing on gold, diamonds, and broken jewelry of any weight or karat. Beyond lending, Value Pawn & Jewelry maintains a retail operation selling pre-owned, brand-name merchandise at 25-70% discounts below retail prices, including electronics, jewelry, tools, gaming equipment, and fashion items. They offer flexible payment options including layaway (with 10% down and monthly payments), third-party financing for extended payment terms, and an online shop for remote browsing and purchasing.

Value Pawn & Jewelry distinguishes itself through its EZ+ Rewards Program, which allows customers to manage pawns, layaways, and rewards online while earning EZ Points on eligible transactions. The company provides an Instant Quote tool for electronics valuation, specialty services including firearms sales and auto loans, and protection plans for jewelry (VIP Program with guaranteed loan amounts and trade-up benefits) and general merchandise. Store hours span 9am-7pm weekdays, 9am-6pm Saturday, and 12pm-5pm Sunday, making the location accessible throughout the week.

Value Pawn & Jewelry serves customers needing immediate cash against collateral or those seeking discounted pre-owned merchandise. However, pawn loans are subject to fees and terms not fully detailed on the website, and like all pawn transactions, customers risk losing collateral if unable to repay. The business operates in a regulated industry with inherent transaction costs, and availability of specific services (auto loans, firearms) varies by location. This is primarily a retail-focused pawn operation rather than a credit-building or financial advisory service.
pros: Immediate cash available on pawn loans without credit checks, based solely on collateral value
Expert precious metals testing ensures fair pricing when selling gold and diamond jewelry
Significant discounts (25-70% off retail) on thousands of brand-name pre-owned items refreshed daily
Flexible payment options including layaway with only 10% down and extended third-party financing up to 12 months
EZ+ Rewards Program allows online management of pawns and layaways with points earned on transactions
Convenient Instant Quote tool provides estimated item values in seconds for electronics
Jewelry VIP Program offers guaranteed loan amounts, free cleaning, and 100% trade-up amounts on future purchases
Extended store hours (9am-7pm weekdays) and weekend availability for accessibility
cons: Pawn loans carry unspecified fees and restrictive terms that could make repayment expensive and difficult
Risk of losing collateral permanently if unable to repay the pawn loan within the agreed timeframe
All items are pre-owned with no warranties from original manufacturers (brand owners do not endorse or affiliate with EZPAWN)
Not all services (auto loans, firearms, online payments) are available in all states, limiting accessibility for some customers
Online payment options explicitly not available in Arizona, Oregon, or Pennsylvania, restricting convenience for those locations
best_for: Individuals needing immediate cash ($100-$5,000+) against personal collateral without credit approval
Budget-conscious shoppers seeking steep discounts on quality pre-owned electronics, tools, jewelry, and brand-name merchandise
People with poor or no credit history who cannot access traditional bank loans or credit products
Sellers of gold, diamonds, or jewelry looking for fair market pricing from expert evaluators
diagnosis: Value Pawn & Jewelry is best for people who need immediate cash against collateral or want to buy heavily discounted pre-owned items, and who either lack access to traditional credit or prefer not to use it. The main caveat is that pawn loans involve fees, restrictive terms, and the risk of losing your collateral if you cannot repay, making this an expensive short-term funding option suitable only for true emergencies with items you can afford to lose.
services: Pawn loans on personal items in working condition
Gold and diamond jewelry buying with precious metals testing
Retail sales of pre-owned brand-name merchandise at 25-70% discounts
Layaway with 10% down and monthly payment options
Third-party flexible financing (up to 12 months in some cases)
Online shop with daily new arrivals and remote browsing
Instant Quote tool for electronic item valuation
EZ+ Rewards Program with online pawn and layaway management
Jewelry VIP Protection Plan with guaranteed loan amounts and trade-up benefits
Product Protection Plans for electronics and merchandise coverage
Gold buying and precious metals testing services
